description: Split is a feature management and experimentation platform used to manage feature flags, targeting, and event/identity data. It is now integrated with Harness documentation and token models, but still exposes Split-branded APIs and tooling.
summary: Split.io exposes a REST Admin API at `https://api.split.io/internal/api/v2`, a REST Events API at `https://events.split.io/api`, and a community-maintained Python Admin API CLI; authentication uses Split admin or SDK API keys, and the Admin API also accepts Harness PATs and SATs.
